en_US.Aucun équipement PS5 trouvé, cliquez sur: No PS5 device found, click "Add" to get started
en_US.Adresse IP de la PS5 sur le réseau local: IP address of the PS5 on the local network. Remember to set a static DHCP lease.
en_US.L'adresse IP suffit pour la détection d': The IP address is all you need for state detection (on / rest mode / off). This part is entirely local and requires no additional configuration.
en_US.Les commandes \"Réveiller\" et \"Mettre: The "Wake up" and "Standby" commands require prior pairing between Jeedom and your console, done with the PlayStation servers.
en_US.Cet appairage passe par une authentifica: This pairing goes through browser-based authentication: it cannot be automated and must be done manually, from the command line on your Jeedom (SSH access required). This only needs to be done once.
en_US.Tant que l'appairage n'est pas réalisé,: Until pairing is done, these two commands will have no effect. The rest of the plugin works normally.
en_US.La procédure complète est décrite dans l: The full procedure is described in the plugin documentation.
en_US.Les firmwares PS5 récents ne diffusent p: Recent PS5 firmwares no longer broadcast the game name on the local network: only the PlayStation presence API provides it.
en_US.Ce champ est facultatif. Laissé vide, le: This field is optional. Left empty, the plugin remains entirely local and the "Current application" command stays empty.
en_US.Le jeu est remonté quel que soit l'écran: The game is reported regardless of the screen used: TV or Remote Play (PlayStation Portal, smartphone, PC). However, it is not possible to know which device the game is played on: Sony does not expose this information.
en_US.Jeton de session PSN. Connectez-vous à v: PSN session token. Sign in to your account on playstation.com, then open https://ca.account.sony.com/api/v1/ssocookie in the same browser: copy only the value of the npsso field (64 characters). This token expires after a few weeks and will need to be renewed.
en_US.Optionnel : requis pour afficher le jeu: Optional: required to display the current game
en_US.Ancienne méthode de réveil, conservée po: Former wake-up method, kept for existing installations. This field is no longer needed: since pairing with pyremoteplay, wake-up works without it. Leave it empty.
How often the console is polled. 1 minute by default. The request is local and very lightweight (a single UDP packet), so a short interval is not a problem.
en_US.L'état de la console (allumée / veille /: The console state (on / rest mode / off) is retrieved natively, with no dependency.
en_US.Le jeu en cours est optionnel et nécessi: The current game is optional and requires an npsso token (see the device configuration).
en_US.Le réveil et la mise en veille nécessite: Wake-up and standby require the pyremoteplay Python library and pairing with your PSN account, to be done once via SSH: see the plugin documentation.
en_US.Rafraîchissement effectué, rechargez la: Refresh done, reload the page to see the values
en_US.Impossible de créer la socket UDP: Unable to create the UDP socket
en_US.ps5_cli.py introuvable dans le dossier r: ps5_cli.py not found in the plugin's resources folder
en_US.Impossible d'écrire le jeton npsso tempo: Unable to write the temporary npsso token
